item.title: Microsoft Azure
item.summary: Microsoft 面向企业的云与 AI 经营单元。

updates.event: 微软切换至 MAI 模型的原因是速度和 [其他方面] 有显著提升

evidence.source_quote: Grund für den Wechsel sind deutliche Verbesserungen bei Geschwindigkeit und […]

evidence_cards.source_quote: Grund für den Wechsel sind deutliche Verbesserungen bei Geschwindigkeit und […]

updates.event: 语音能力更新：MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters and runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 at 32% lower cost.；MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters and is 32% cheaper than MAI-Voice-2.

evidence.source_quote: Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Am 23. Juli 2026 startete das Unternehmen die öffentliche Vorschau seiner neuen Modelle MAI-Image-2.5-Pro und MAI-Voice-2-Flash.
Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

updates.event: MAI-Code-1-Flash achieves approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft says the model achieves an approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.

updates.topic: mai code 1 flash code accept rate

evidence_cards.source_quote: Microsoft says the model achieves an approximately 10% higher code accept rate than GPT-5.4 Mini and Claude Haiku 4.5 in VS Code, while using 10% fewer median tokens.

updates.event: In PowerPoint, MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2.

evidence.source_quote: In PowerPoint, Microsoft says MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2, OpenAI's image model.

evidence_cards.source_quote: In PowerPoint, Microsoft says MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2, OpenAI's image model.

updates.event: 同主题更新：Microsoft priced MAI-Image-2.5-Pro at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.；MAI-Image-2.5-Pro is priced at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image in…
updates.after: "$5 per million text input tokens; $8 per million image input tokens; $106 per million image output tokens"

evidence.source_quote: Microsoft priced the model at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Microsoft priced the model at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

updates.event: 33% of surveyed enterprises cite Microsoft Azure as a provider they are considering switching to or adding.

evidence.source_quote: the providers drawing the most switching consideration are again the incumbents — Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud (33% each), OpenAI (30%), and Gemini (22%)

evidence_cards.source_quote: the providers drawing the most switching consideration are again the incumbents — Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud (33% each), OpenAI (30%), and Gemini (22%)

updates.event: Microsoft provides a Microsoft Azure Government Cloud platform used to host secure, compliant government workloads.

evidence.source_quote: Combined with Microsoft Azure’s trusted government cloud platform, the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Combined with Microsoft Azure’s trusted government cloud platform, the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers.

updates.event: 同主题更新：Named Knox customers/partners include Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers relying on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government.；Adobe、Armis、Celonis、BigID 等领先软件提供商通过 Knox 在 Azure 政府云上为政府客户提供商用创新技术。
updates.after: "Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers"

evidence.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.

updates.event: 通过 Knox 预授权的联邦托管云，软件公司可在 90 天内在 Microsoft Azure 政府云上获得可用于生产的联邦云环境。

evidence.source_quote: Knox enables software providers to achieve production-ready federal cloud environments in as little as 90 days through its pre-authorized Federal Managed Cloud.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Knox enables software providers to achieve production-ready federal cloud environments in as little as 90 days through its pre-authorized Federal Managed Cloud.

updates.event: 安全风险更新：Azure Databricks integrations span Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.；The collaboration expands t…
updates.after: "integration across Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, OneLake, Power BI, Purview, Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot"

evidence.source_quote: Deeply integrated across the Microsoft ecosystem spanning Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

evidence_cards.source_quote: the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers

The collaboration strengthens Microsoft’s ecosystem for independent software vendors (ISVs) pursuing government opportunities while expanding the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.

Deeply integrated across the Microsoft ecosystem spanning Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

metricSummary.selection_policy: 只展示可跨期比较、会影响经营或战略位置的主指标。

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 90天

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 12个月

trends.summary: 尚无经审核的趋势判断
trends.label: 3年

facts.subject: isv_ecosystem_expansion_focus
facts.statement: 此次合作旨在强化微软面向美国政府机会的独立软件供应商（ISV）生态系统，覆盖 AI 原生、网络安全、企业软件及关键基础设施公司。

evidence_cards.source_quote: The collaboration strengthens Microsoft’s ecosystem for independent software vendors (ISVs) pursuing government opportunities while expanding the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.

facts.subject: mai_voice_2_flash_pricing
facts.statement: MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters and is 32% cheaper than MAI-Voice-2.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

facts.subject: azure_databricks_native_integration_scope
facts.statement: Azure Databricks is a native Azure service, allowing customers to ground and operate agents on enterprise data via Genie, Genie Ontology and Unity AI Gateway directly within their Microsoft environment.

evidence_cards.source_quote: As a native Azure service, Azure Databricks makes its AI capabilities available directly within customers' existing Microsoft environment, grounding and operating agents on enterprise data with Genie and Genie Ontology, and governing models, agents and cost through Unity AI Gateway

facts.subject: databricks_genie_microsoft_365_integration
facts.statement: Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway are deeply integrated across Microsoft product stack, including Microsoft 365, Teams, Copilot, Entra, OneLake, Power BI, Purview and Foundry.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Deeply integrated across the Microsoft ecosystem spanning Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

facts.subject: copilot_studio_model_support
facts.statement: Mistral Medium 3.5将支持企业级AI智能体Copilot Studio用户使用

evidence_cards.source_quote: Mistral Medium 3.5也将支持企业级AI智能体Copilot Studio用户使用。

facts.subject: azure_supply_constraint
facts.statement: 摩根士丹利判断Azure增长瓶颈来自产能供给侧，市场需求保持旺盛。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 大摩判断 Azure 增长瓶颈来自产能供给，市场需求保持旺盛。

facts.subject: platform_type
facts.statement: Microsoft provides a Microsoft Azure Government Cloud platform used to host secure, compliant government workloads.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Combined with Microsoft Azure’s trusted government cloud platform, the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers.

facts.subject: azure_cobalt_cpu_architecture
facts.statement: Azure Cobalt is described as Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure used by Databricks to improve performance and efficiency.

evidence_cards.source_quote: leveraging Azure Cobalt, Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure, to improve performance and efficiency

facts.subject: azure_cobalt_architecture
facts.statement: Azure Cobalt is Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure.

evidence_cards.source_quote: leveraging Azure Cobalt, Microsoft's next-generation Arm-based infrastructure

facts.subject: azure_cobalt_adoption
facts.statement: Databricks currently uses Azure Cobalt 100 and plans to adopt Cobalt 200.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Databricks currently uses Cobalt 100 and plans to adopt Cobalt 200

facts.subject: cobalt_200_memory_encryption
facts.statement: Azure Cobalt 200 includes memory encryption enabled by default.

evidence_cards.source_quote: includes memory encryption enabled by default

facts.subject: gpu_cost_reduction_powerpoint
facts.statement: In PowerPoint, MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2.

evidence_cards.source_quote: In PowerPoint, Microsoft says MAI-Image-2.5 reduces GPU costs by up to 84% compared with GPT-Image-2, OpenAI's image model.

facts.subject: mai_image_25_pro_pricing
facts.statement: MAI-Image-2.5-Pro is priced at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Microsoft priced the model at $5 per million text input tokens, $8 per million image input tokens, and $106 per million image output tokens.

facts.subject: mai_voice_2_flash_pricing
facts.statement: MAI-Voice-2-Flash is priced at $15 per million characters, 32% less than MAI-Voice-2.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Flash runs twice as fast as MAI-Voice-2 and costs 32% less, priced at $15 per million characters.

facts.subject: federal_cloud_deployment_time_target
facts.statement: 通过 Knox 预授权的联邦托管云，软件公司可在 90 天内在 Microsoft Azure 政府云上获得可用于生产的联邦云环境。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Knox enables software providers to achieve production-ready federal cloud environments in as little as 90 days through its pre-authorized Federal Managed Cloud.

facts.subject: databricks_internal_workload_hosting
facts.statement: Databricks will run its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks, using the same platform it delivers to customers.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Databricks deepens its commitment to Azure, running its own core business operations and analytics on Azure Databricks, using the very platform it delivers to customers at scale

facts.subject: partnership_ai_infrastructure
facts.statement: 微软与法国大模型公司Mistral AI宣布达成数十亿美元AI基础设施建设合作

evidence_cards.source_quote: 微软称，此次合作的基础是一项价值数十亿美元的AI基础设施建设协议。

facts.subject: model_switch_reason_speed
facts.statement: 微软切换至 MAI 模型的原因是速度和 [其他方面] 有显著提升

evidence_cards.source_quote: Grund für den Wechsel sind deutliche Verbesserungen bei Geschwindigkeit und […]

facts.subject: partnership_extension_term
facts.statement: Databricks and Microsoft extended their decade-long strategic partnership into the 2030s to scale enterprise AI.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Databricks and Microsoft extend strategic partnership through the 2030s to scale enterprise AI

facts.subject: partner_customer_roster
facts.statement: Named Knox customers/partners include Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers relying on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.

facts.subject: isv_ecosystem_target_segments
facts.statement: The collaboration expands the pathway for AI-native, cybersecurity, enterprise software, and critical infrastructure companies to bring production workloads to Azure.

evidence_cards.source_quote: the collaboration provides an accelerated path for innovative software companies seeking to serve federal civilian and defense customers

facts.subject: genie_microsoft_365_integration
facts.statement: Microsoft is integrating Databricks Genie and Unity AI Gateway across the Microsoft product stack including Microsoft 365.

evidence_cards.source_quote: both companies advance native integration across the Microsoft stack, including Databricks Genie and Microsoft 365

facts.subject: azure_databricks_integrated_microsoft_services
facts.statement: Azure Databricks integrations span Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot.

evidence_cards.source_quote: Deeply integrated across the Microsoft ecosystem spanning Microsoft Entra, Azure Data Lake Storage, Azure security, Microsoft OneLake, Power BI, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Foundry, Power Platform, Microsoft 365, Teams and Copilot

facts.subject: named_partner_customers_on_knox
facts.statement: Adobe、Armis、Celonis、BigID 等领先软件提供商通过 Knox 在 Azure 政府云上为政府客户提供商用创新技术。

evidence_cards.source_quote: Customers including Adobe, Armis, Celonis, BigID, and other leading software providers rely on Knox to bring commercial innovation to government faster while maintaining rigorous security standards.
